scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only; the full Discovery API surface (venue detail, attraction detail, suggest/autocomplete, images, event-to-attraction expansion, etc.) is out of scope outside this connector's current declared surface. ticketmaster is read-only in legacy (Capabilities.Write is false) so no writes.json.

excluded.reason: not implemented as a stream because it introduces an additional resource family or request shape outside this connector's current sync scope
